top_findings.summary: The skill description requests broad Bash tool permissions (npm:*, node:*, kubectl:*) without clear necessity for all migration scenarios. While npm and node commands are reasonable for SDK installation and migration scripts, unrestricted kubectl access (including cluster administration capabilities) is excessive for a general migration tool. A migration skill should only require such elevated Kubernetes permissions if specifically migrating a containerized deployment, which isn't explicitly stated as the primary purpose. The skill also requests Write/Edit permissions system-wide without data scope limitations.
